categories.title: Accessories
categories.tagline: The details that upgrade your setup.

products.title: HP Elite x2 1012 G2
products.subtitle: 7th Gen Core i5 · 16GB RAM · 512GB SSD · Touchscreen · Backlit
products.shortDesc: Premium detachable 2-in-1 business laptop with Face ID and Full HD+ touchscreen.
overview: The HP Elite x2 1012 G2 combines the power of a business laptop with the convenience and portability of a tablet.
Designed for professionals who are constantly on the move, the detachable keyboard lets you switch effortlessly between laptop and tablet modes depending on your workflow.
Whether you're attending meetings, presenting to clients, working remotely, taking notes, or browsing the web, the Elite x2 adapts seamlessly to your needs.
Premium construction, touchscreen functionality and advanced security features make it an ideal companion for today's mobile workforce.

sections.title: Powerful 7th Gen Intel Processing
sections.body: Powered by the Intel Core i5-7300U processor, the Elite x2 G2 delivers reliable performance for Microsoft Office Suite, business applications, professional multitasking, virtual meetings, online learning, web browsing, programming and everyday productivity.

sections.title: 16GB RAM. 512GB NVMe SSD.
sections.body: Run multiple applications simultaneously while maintaining excellent responsiveness. Lightning-fast startup, smooth multitasking, quick app launches and fast file transfers.

sections.title: Laptop or Tablet. You Decide.
sections.body: The responsive touchscreen and detachable keyboard give you maximum flexibility. Perfect for digital note-taking, reading documents, business presentations and travel.

products.title: Dell Latitude 7490
products.subtitle: 8th Gen Core i7 · 16GB RAM · 512GB SSD · 14" FHD
products.shortDesc: Slim ultrabook engineered for demanding professionals who move fast.
overview: The Dell Latitude 7490 is engineered for professionals who move fast and expect their laptop to keep up.
Its lightweight carbon-fiber chassis pairs with an 8th Gen Intel Core i7 processor for a machine that feels effortless in the hand and relentless at work.
Whether you're managing spreadsheets, running virtual meetings or building presentations, the Latitude 7490 handles it without breaking a sweat.

sections.title: Built for real productivity
sections.body: The 8th Gen quad-core i7 processor gives you the headroom to run heavy business apps, browsers with dozens of tabs and video calls all at once.

sections.title: Travel-ready design
sections.body: At under 1.4kg with a carbon-fiber lid, the Latitude 7490 is easy to carry all day and rugged enough to trust in your bag.

products.title: Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 7
products.subtitle: 8th Gen Core i7 · 16GB · 1TB SSD · 14" WQHD
products.shortDesc: Iconic ThinkPad reliability with a lightweight carbon build and premium display.
products.tagline: The business laptop that professionals swear by.
overview: The ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 7 is a masterclass in business laptops — light in your bag, uncompromising in performance.
The 14-inch WQHD display, best-in-class keyboard and industry-leading reliability make it a favorite of executives worldwide.

sections.title: A keyboard you'll actually love
sections.body: ThinkPad keyboards are widely considered the best on any laptop. Deep travel, precise feedback, and the iconic TrackPoint make long typing sessions effortless.

sections.title: Reliability that just doesn't quit
sections.body: MIL-SPEC tested, spill-resistant and built to survive drops, temperature swings and daily travel.

products.title: Apple MacBook Pro 13" (M1)
products.subtitle: Apple M1 · 8GB · 256GB SSD · Retina Display
products.shortDesc: Silent, fast and outstanding battery life — the first-generation Apple Silicon MacBook Pro.
overview: The M1 MacBook Pro delivers game-changing performance per watt, all-day battery life and near-silent operation.
Perfect for creators, developers and anyone who wants a machine that stays fast and cool under load.

sections.title: Battery that outlasts your day
sections.body: Up to 20 hours of video playback on a single charge — genuine all-day, no-compromise usage.

products.title: Dell OptiPlex 7070 Micro
products.subtitle: 9th Gen Core i5 · 16GB · 512GB SSD · Compact
products.shortDesc: A powerful mini-desktop that fits behind a monitor and handles serious work.
products.tagline: Full desktop power in the palm of your hand.
overview: The Dell OptiPlex 7070 Micro packs 9th Gen Intel performance into a chassis you can mount behind any monitor.
Ideal for professional workstations, front-desk deployments, home offices and anywhere you want power without the tower.

sections.title: Small footprint, serious output
sections.body: The Micro form factor takes up almost no space on your desk but delivers full-desktop performance for Office, development, browsers and business apps.

products.title: HP EliteDesk 800 G5 SFF
products.subtitle: 9th Gen Core i7 · 16GB · 1TB SSD
products.shortDesc: Small form factor business desktop with room to grow.
overview: The HP EliteDesk 800 G5 SFF is designed for professionals who need serious desktop performance in a compact chassis.
Perfect for accounting workflows, development environments, dense multitasking and business applications that need consistent power.

sections.title: Grow with your business
sections.body: Multiple RAM slots, drive bays and PCIe expansion mean the 800 G5 is ready when your workload grows.

products.title: Lenovo ThinkCentre M720q Tiny
products.subtitle: 8th Gen Core i5 · 8GB · 256GB SSD
products.shortDesc: Ultra-compact ThinkCentre with Lenovo reliability.
products.tagline: Reliable computing in an ultra-compact package.
overview: The ThinkCentre M720q Tiny brings ThinkPad-level reliability to the desktop in a form factor small enough to hide anywhere.
Perfect for reception desks, digital signage, POS terminals or a clutter-free home office.

sections.title: Tiny but mighty
sections.body: The 1L chassis is small enough to hide anywhere, but powerful enough for demanding business apps.

products.title: Apple iMac 27" (2019)
products.subtitle: 9th Gen Core i5 · 8GB · 1TB Fusion · 5K Retina
products.shortDesc: The stunning all-in-one desktop with a 5K Retina display.
products.tagline: The all-in-one desktop that professionals love.
overview: The 27-inch iMac (2019) pairs stunning 5K Retina visuals with capable 9th Gen Intel performance.
Ideal for creators, editors, photographers and anyone who wants a beautiful desk-side workstation.

sections.title: A screen worth working on
sections.body: 5120 x 2880 with wide P3 color gamut — text is razor sharp and photos look extraordinary.

products.title: Amazon Echo Dot (5th Gen)
products.subtitle: Smart Speaker with Alexa · Improved Audio
products.shortDesc: The best-selling smart speaker with clearer vocals and deeper bass.
overview: The all-new Echo Dot (5th Gen) delivers clearer vocals, deeper bass and vibrant sound in a compact package.
Ask Alexa to play music, control smart home devices, set alarms, check the weather and much more.
features: Works with thousands of smart devices

sections.title: Your voice assistant for everything
sections.body: Ask Alexa to answer questions, tell jokes, read audiobooks and control your smart home — all hands-free.

products.title: Apple Watch SE (2nd Gen)
products.subtitle: 40mm · GPS · Fitness & Health Tracking
products.shortDesc: The essential Apple Watch experience with the features that matter most.
overview: Apple Watch SE (2nd Gen) delivers the core Apple Watch experience at an accessible price.
Track your fitness, monitor your health, stay connected and get more out of every day.

sections.title: Your health, on your wrist
sections.body: Track workouts, monitor heart rate, measure blood oxygen and stay on top of your goals.

products.title: Google Nest Hub (2nd Gen)
products.subtitle: 7-inch Smart Display · Sleep Sensing
products.shortDesc: Your helpful smart display with Google Assistant and Sleep Sensing.
products.tagline: A helpful hub for your whole home.
overview: The Google Nest Hub (2nd Gen) is the perfect nightstand or kitchen companion with Sleep Sensing, Google Assistant and rich sound.

sections.title: The perfect nightstand companion
sections.body: Sleep Sensing uses radar to track your sleep patterns without a wearable — just place it beside your bed.

products.title: Ring Video Doorbell 4
products.subtitle: HD Video · Motion Detection · Two-Way Talk
products.shortDesc: See, hear and speak to visitors from anywhere.
overview: Ring Video Doorbell 4 sends instant alerts to your phone when someone visits — see, hear and speak to them from anywhere.

sections.title: See who's there — from anywhere
sections.body: Instant mobile alerts and live video means you always know who's at your door, whether you're home or not.

products.title: Logitech MX Master 3S

products.shortDesc: The mouse that professionals trust — refined with quieter clicks and higher tracking.
overview: The MX Master 3S combines a legendary MagSpeed scroll wheel with quieter clicks, 8K DPI tracking and a shape designed for all-day comfort.
Multi-device pairing, USB-C fast charging and Logi Flow across computers make it the ultimate productivity mouse.

sections.title: Scroll through documents at speed
sections.body: MagSpeed lets you scroll 1000 lines per second, then switch to precise ratchet mode for detailed work.

products.title: Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Gen)
products.subtitle: Active Noise Cancellation · Adaptive Audio · MagSafe
products.shortDesc: The AirPods experience, dramatically improved.
overview: AirPods Pro (2nd Gen) deliver next-level Active Noise Cancellation, Adaptive Audio that tunes to your environment, and Personalized Spatial Audio.

sections.title: Noise cancellation that just gets it right
sections.body: The H2 chip provides up to 2x more Active Noise Cancellation than the previous generation.

products.title: Anker 737 Power Bank (PowerCore 24K)
products.subtitle: 24,000mAh · 140W · Smart Digital Display
products.shortDesc: Charge a MacBook Pro at full speed, from anywhere.
products.tagline: The world's most capable power bank.
overview: 24,000mAh of capacity with 140W of USB-C output — enough to fast-charge a 16-inch MacBook Pro or any USB-C laptop.

sections.title: One power bank for every device
sections.body: From iPhones to full MacBooks, the 737 charges everything at full speed with plenty left in the tank.

products.title: Samsung T7 Shield 1TB
products.subtitle: Portable SSD · USB 3.2 Gen 2 · Rugged
products.shortDesc: Rugged portable SSD with blazing transfer speeds.
overview: The Samsung T7 Shield delivers up to 1,050 MB/s read speeds in a rugged rubberized shell rated for 3-meter drops.
features: Up to 1,050 MB/s read / 1,000 MB/s write
Compatible with Mac, PC, Android, iPad Pro

sections.title: Built for creators on the move
sections.body: Rugged enough to survive a shoot in the field, fast enough to edit 4K video directly off the drive.

products.title: Samsung 980 PRO 1TB NVMe SSD
products.subtitle: PCIe 4.0 · 7,000 MB/s Read · M.2 2280
products.shortDesc: Blazing PCIe 4.0 NVMe storage for pro workloads and gaming.
overview: The Samsung 980 PRO delivers PCIe 4.0 speeds up to 7,000 MB/s — perfect for gaming, 4K/8K video editing and heavy-duty pro workloads.

sections.title: Game and create at PCIe 4.0 speed
sections.body: Cut load times in half, edit 8K footage directly off the drive, or compile massive codebases in seconds.

products.title: Corsair Vengeance LPX 32GB DDR4-3200
products.subtitle: 2 x 16GB · Low-Profile · Intel XMP 2.0
products.shortDesc: Reliable, low-profile DDR4 with proven Corsair performance.
overview: Corsair Vengeance LPX 32GB (2 x 16GB) DDR4-3200 memory delivers rock-solid performance for gaming, productivity and content creation.

sections.title: Serious multitasking headroom
sections.body: 32GB of memory means you can run demanding games, virtual machines and multiple browsers without slowing down.

products.title: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070
products.subtitle: 12GB GDDR6X · Ada Lovelace · DLSS 3
products.shortDesc: Serious 1440p gaming and creation with DLSS 3 and ray tracing.
products.tagline: The GPU built for the era of AI.
overview: The GeForce RTX 4070 delivers superb 1440p gaming performance with the power of NVIDIA's Ada Lovelace architecture, DLSS 3 and ray tracing.

sections.title: 1440p gaming, done right
sections.body: The RTX 4070 delivers over 100 FPS in modern AAA games at 1440p with ray tracing enabled.

products.title: AMD Ryzen 7 7700X
products.subtitle: 8 Cores · 16 Threads · 5.4GHz Boost · AM5
products.shortDesc: 8-core Zen 4 powerhouse for gaming and productivity.
overview: The Ryzen 7 7700X is AMD's mainstream Zen 4 champion — 8 cores, 16 threads and a 5.4GHz boost clock deliver top-tier gaming and content-creation performance.

sections.title: Zen 4 changes the game
sections.body: 5nm process node, DDR5 memory support and PCIe 5.0 make the 7700X a future-ready foundation for your build.

faqs.q: Will my order be delivered to my doorstep?
faqs.a: Yes, your order will be delivered directly to your doorstep anywhere in Nigeria. In areas where our dispatch riders cannot reach the exact address, you'll be contacted to pick it up at the nearest designated pickup location.

faqs.q: How do I pay for my order?
faqs.a: Payment is processed securely through Paystack. You can pay using your debit card, bank transfer, USSD, or bank account directly from the checkout popup.

faqs.q: When will my order be shipped?
faqs.a: Once payment is confirmed, your order is processed and dispatched within 24 hours.
Lagos State: 24 to 48 hours. Other states in Nigeria: 3 to 7 business days.

faqs.q: Does the product come with a warranty?
faqs.a: Yes, every unit comes with a 30-day warranty covering functionality and hardware issues that are not caused by physical damage or misuse.

faqs.q: Is the item new or used?
faqs.a: Products are clearly marked as either New or Premium Pre-Owned. Pre-Owned units are professionally tested, fully functional, and in excellent working condition.

faqs.q: Can I return the item if I change my mind?
faqs.a: We do not accept returns for change of mind. However, if the item arrives with a functional issue covered by the 30-day warranty, contact us immediately and we'll resolve it.

faqs.q: How do I contact you if I have more questions?
faqs.a: Tap the floating WhatsApp button on any page or use the contact form to reach us directly.

site.name: New Store
site.tagline: Premium tech. Honest prices. Delivered across Nigeria.
